# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent istio authz bypass.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservices-access-control
  namespace: your-namespace
spec:
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        requestPrincipals: ["your-service-account@your-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/resource", "/api/v1/another-resource"]
  - from:
    - source:
        requestPrincipals: ["another-service-account@your-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/resource"]
  - from:
    - source:
        requestPrincipals: ["*"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["OPTIONS"]
        paths: ["*"]
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        requestPrincipals: ["your-service-account@your-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["PUT", "DELETE"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/resource"]
  - from:
    - source:
        requestPrincipals: ["another-service-account@your-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["POST"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/another-resource"]
  action: DENY
  targets:
  - name: your-service
    ports:
    - number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
  - name: another-service
    ports:
    - number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
  provider:
    name: your-authorization-provider
    type: JWT
    issuer: https://your-issuer-url
    audiences:
    - your-audience
    jwksUri: https://your-jwks-uri
    claims:
      - claim: "sub"
        value: "your-service-account@your-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com"
